first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations (3/10), and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's outdated C++ experience and lack of domain knowledge in industrial automation and cybersecurity as the core reasons for the low score. The minor differences in phrasing and the specific technologies mentioned are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in location.
